args.code: (async () => { const counts=()=>({ fie:document.querySelectorAll('.fie-impression-container').length, dvn:document.querySelectorAll('[data-view-name="feed-full-update"]').length, actor:document.querySelectorAll('.update-components-actor__container, .update-components-actor').length, li:document.querySelectorAll('div.scaffold-finite-scroll__content > *, ul[role=list] > li').length }); const findScroller=()=>{ let best=null; document.querySelectorAll('*').forEach(el=>{ const oy=getComputedStyle(el).overflowY; if((oy==='auto'||oy==='scroll') && el.scrollHeight>el.clientHeight+20){ if(!best||el.clientHeight>best.clientHeight) best=el; } }); return best; }; const steps=[]; steps.push({t:'init', top:0, sh:0, ...counts()}); for(let i=0;i<10;i++){ const sc=findScroller(); if(sc){ sc.scrollBy(0, sc.clientHeight*0.9); } else { window.scrollBy(0, window.innerHeight); } await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2200)); const s=findScroller(); steps.push({ i, scroller: s?s.tagName:'window', top: s?s.scrollTop:window.scrollY, sh: s?s.scrollHeight:0, ...counts() }); } return JSON.stringify(steps); })()
